zh.lifeSummary: 當Estienne de Troyes於大約1061年出生在法國時，他的父親Eudes DE BLOIS22歲，母親Adelaide de Normandie34歲。他和Hawise de Mortimer至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1127年享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Estienne de Troyes于大约1061年出生在法国时，他的父亲Eudes DE BLOIS22岁，母亲Adelaide de Normandie34岁。他和Hawise de Mortimer至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1127年享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Troyes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Swiss German Treyer, a cognate of 2 below and 3 below or a variant of Dreyer .

German: variant of Treuer (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), in the south a topographic name for someone who lived by a cattle track (Treyen, from Latin trivium ‘trail’), in the north an occupational name derived from Middle Low German troye ‘jerkin’ (compare 5 below). The surname Troyer is very rare in Germany.
Americanized form of Austrian German Trojer: topographic name derived from South German dialect troi ‘cattle track’, a cognate of 2 above.

variants.name: Dreyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Johannes, Kurt, Baerbel, Bernhard, Christoph, Claus, Dieter, Ernst, Hedwig.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname derived from German drei ‘three’, Middle High German drī(e), with the addition of the suffix -er. This was the name of a medieval coin worth three hellers (see Heller ), and it is possible that the German surname may have been derived from this word. More probably, the nickname is derived from some other connection with the number three, too anecdotal to be even guessed at now.
North German and Scandinavian: occupational name for a turner of wood or bone, from an agent derivative of Middle Low German dreien, dregen ‘to turn’. See also Dressler .

nameMeanings.name: Estienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

en.lifeSummary: When Estienne de Troyes was born about 1061, in France, his father, Eudes DE BLOIS, was 22 and his mother, Adelaide de Normandie, was 34. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Hawise de Mortimer. He died about 1127, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Estienne de Troyes est né environ 1061, à France, son père, Eudes DE BLOIS, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Normandie, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Hawise de Mortimer. Il est décédé environ 1127, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Estienne de Troyes um 1061 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes DE BLOIS 22 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Normandie 34. Er hatte mit Hawise de Mortimer mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1127 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Estienne de Troyes è nato il circa 1061 nel Francia, il suo padre, Eudes DE BLOIS, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Normandie, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Hawise de Mortimer. Morì circa 1127, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Estienne de Troyesが約1061年にフランスで生まれた時，父Eudes DE BLOISは22歳，母Adelaide de Normandieは34歳であった。彼はHawise de Mortimerとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1127年に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Estienne de Troyes(이)가 대략 1061년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes DE BLOIS(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Normandie(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Hawise de Mortimer(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1127년 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1061–about 1127: tany ho any amin'ny 1061–tany ho any amin'ny 1127

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Estienne de Troyes nasceu aproximadamente 1061, em França, seu pai, Eudes DE BLOIS, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Normandie, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Hawise de Mortimer. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1127, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Estienne de Troyes родился около 1061 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes DE BLOIS было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Normandie, 34. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Hawise de Mortimer. Он умер около 1127 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

sm.about 1061–about 1127: e tusa o le 1061–e tusa o le 1127
sm.1082-1187: mai le 1082 e o'o I le 1187

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Estienne de Troyes nació aproximadamente 1061, en Francia, su papá, Eudes DE BLOIS, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Normandie, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Hawise de Mortimer. Murió aproximadamente 1127, a la edad de 68 años.
